case_title: TARGET NATIONAL BANK VS. JUANCHO C DIAZ et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-15-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
